mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.conversation_code, c.conversation_type, c.conversation_scene, c.source_post_code, c.anonymous_flag, c.status, c.created_by, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_at, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM dm_conversations c JOIN dm_conversation_participants p1 ON p1.conversation_id = c.id AND p1.user_id = #{userId} AND p1.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN dm_conversation_participants p2 ON p2.conversation_id = c.id AND p2.user_id = #{peerUserId} AND p2.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.conversation_scene = #{conversationScene} AND ( (#{sourcePostCode} IS NULL AND c.source_post_code IS NULL) OR c.source_post_code = #{sourcePostCode} ) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dm_conversations ( conversation_code, conversation_type, conversation_scene, source_post_code, anonymous_flag, status, created_by, last_message_id, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{conversationCode}, #{conversationType}, #{conversationScene}, #{sourcePostCode}, #{anonymousFlag}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{lastMessageId}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO dm_conversation_participants ( conversation_id, user_id, last_read_message_id, last_read_at, unread_count, pinned_flag, muted_flag, cleared_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{lastReadMessageId}, #{lastReadAt}, #{unreadCount}, #{pinnedFlag}, #{mutedFlag}, #{clearedAt}, #{deletedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM dm_conversations WHERE conversation_code = #{conversationCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.conversation_code, CASE WHEN c.anonymous_flag = 1 OR c.conversation_scene = 'ANONYMOUS_POST' THEN '匿名树洞作者' ELSE peer.name END AS peer_name, CASE WHEN c.anonymous_flag = 1 OR c.conversation_scene = 'ANONYMOUS_POST' THEN '匿名私信会话' ELSE peer.tagline END AS peer_subtitle, CASE WHEN c.anonymous_flag = 1 OR c.conversation_scene = 'ANONYMOUS_POST' THEN '/images/avatar-anonymous.svg' ELSE peer.avatar_url END AS peer_avatar_url, CASE WHEN c.anonymous_flag = 1 OR c.conversation_scene = 'ANONYMOUS_POST' THEN 'ANONYMOUS_POST' WHEN c.conversation_type = 'SINGLE' THEN 'DIRECT' ELSE c.conversation_type END AS conversation_type, CASE WHEN last_message.status = 'REVOKED' THEN CASE WHEN last_message.sender_user_id = p.user_id THEN '你撤回了一条消息' ELSE '对方撤回了一条消息' END ELSE last_message.content_payload END AS last_message, DATE_FORMAT(c.last_message_at, '%H:%i') AS display_time, p.unread_count, COALESCE(c.last_message_at, c.created_at) AS sort_time FROM dm_conversation_participants p JOIN dm_conversations c ON c.id = p.conversation_id JOIN dm_conversation_participants peer_p ON peer_p.conversation_id = c.id AND peer_p.user_id <> p.user_id AND peer_p.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN users peer ON peer.id = peer_p.user_id LEFT JOIN dm_messages last_message ON last_message.id = c.last_message_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_time DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT c.id, c.conversation_code, CASE WHEN c.anonymous_flag = 1 OR c.conversation_scene = 'ANONYMOUS_POST' THEN '匿名树洞作者' ELSE peer.name END AS peer_name, CASE WHEN c.anonymous_flag = 1 OR c.conversation_scene = 'ANONYMOUS_POST' THEN '匿名私信会话' ELSE peer.tagline END AS peer_subtitle, CASE WHEN c.anonymous_flag = 1 OR c.conversation_scene = 'ANONYMOUS_POST' THEN '/images/avatar-anonymous.svg' ELSE peer.avatar_url END AS peer_avatar_url, CASE WHEN c.anonymous_flag = 1 OR c.conversation_scene = 'ANONYMOUS_POST' THEN 'ANONYMOUS_POST' WHEN c.conversation_type = 'SINGLE' THEN 'DIRECT' ELSE c.conversation_type END AS conversation_type, CASE WHEN last_message.status = 'REVOKED' THEN CASE WHEN last_message.sender_user_id = p.user_id THEN '浣犳挙鍥炰簡涓€鏉℃秷鎭?' ELSE '瀵规柟鎾ゅ洖浜嗕竴鏉℃秷鎭?' END ELSE last_message.content_payload END AS last_message, DATE_FORMAT(c.last_message_at, '%H:%i') AS display_time, p.unread_count, COALESCE(c.last_message_at, c.created_at) AS sort_time FROM dm_conversation_participants p JOIN dm_conversations c ON c.id = p.conversation_id JOIN dm_conversation_participants peer_p ON peer_p.conversation_id = c.id AND peer_p.user_id <> p.user_id AND peer_p.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN users peer ON peer.id = peer_p.user_id LEFT JOIN dm_messages last_message ON last_message.id = c.last_message_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.conversation_code = #{conversationCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.conversation_code, c.conversation_type, c.conversation_scene, c.source_post_code, c.anonymous_flag, c.status, c.created_by, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_at, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM dm_conversations c JOIN dm_conversation_participants p ON p.conversation_id = c.id AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.conversation_code = #{conversationCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.conversation_id, p.user_id, p.last_read_message_id, p.last_read_at, p.unread_count, p.pinned_flag, p.muted_flag, p.cleared_at, p.deleted_at, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM dm_conversation_participants p JOIN dm_conversations c ON c.id = p.conversation_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.conversation_code = #{conversationCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT peer.id, peer.user_code, peer.name, peer.tagline, peer.college, peer.grade_year, peer.bio, peer.avatar_url FROM dm_conversation_participants self_p JOIN dm_conversations c ON c.id = self_p.conversation_id JOIN dm_conversation_participants peer_p ON peer_p.conversation_id = c.id AND peer_p.user_id <> self_p.user_id AND peer_p.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN users peer ON peer.id = peer_p.user_id WHERE self_p.user_id = #{userId} AND self_p.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.conversation_code = #{conversationCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id, m.message_code, m.client_message_id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_user_id, m.message_type, m.status, m.content_payload, m.sent_at, m.recalled_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM dm_messages m JOIN dm_conversations c ON c.id = m.conversation_id JOIN dm_conversation_participants p ON p.conversation_id = c.id AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.conversation_code = #{conversationCode} ORDER BY m.sent_at ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.message_code, m.client_message_id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_user_id, m.message_type, m.status, m.content_payload, m.sent_at, m.recalled_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM dm_messages m JOIN dm_conversations c ON c.id = m.conversation_id JOIN dm_conversation_participants p ON p.conversation_id = c.id AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.conversation_code = #{conversationCode} AND m.message_code = #{messageCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id FROM dm_conversation_participants p JOIN dm_conversations c ON c.id = p.conversation_id WHERE c.conversation_code = #{conversationCode} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY user_id ASC
SELECT p.user_id, COALESCE(SUM(p.unread_count), 0) AS messages_unread FROM dm_conversation_participants p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY p.user_id LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dm_messages ( message_code, client_message_id, conversation_id, sender_user_id, message_type, status, content_payload, sent_at, recalled_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{messageCode}, #{clientMessageId}, #{conversationId}, #{senderUserId}, #{messageType}, #{status}, #{contentPayload}, #{sentAt}, #{recalledAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
